{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Gardeners-in-training
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]] selected three young [[Gardeners-in-training]] to form a team to watch over him.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Sensing this, he selected three young Gardeners-in-training to become a team that would watch over him.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
